div.p: Function Call: foo(3, 5, 7) Arguments pushed in source order:
✅ Natural Mapping The 0-th argument in source code maps directly to the 0-th local variable slot in the VM frame.
Function Call: foo(3, 5, 7) Arguments pushed in source order:
⚠️ Inverted Mapping The rightmost argument (last pushed) becomes the first local variable.

ul.li: Variadic functions (e.g., printf) can find the first argument at a fixed offset from the base.
